description.ko: 음파가 디지털 공간에서 역동적이고 빛나는 기하학적 패턴과 유동적인 입자로 나타나는 소리 주파수의 시각적 탐구입니다.
description.en: A visual exploration of sonic frequencies, where sound waves manifest as dynamic, glowing geometric patterns and fluid particles in a digital void.

prompt: Cinematic macro shot of glowing neon sound waves vibrating through a fluid metallic surface, intricate particle dispersion, 8k resolution, deep blues and electric violets, rhythmic pulse, sound visualization art, ECHO-0 aesthetic.
